business.headline: How Vis Raghavan moved from JPMorgan to Citi in one weekendVis Raghavan moved from JPMorgan Chase to Citigroup's top investment banking role over a single weekend in February 2024. The rapid switch, later detailed by the Financial Times, sharpened attention on his exit and his rising clout at Citi.

Infosys won't cut jobs despite AI shift, says CEO Salil ParekhInfosys CEO Salil Parekh said the company does not plan layoffs despite the AI shift. The stance sets it apart from peers and underscores a hiring-and-reskilling push.

8th Pay Commission update: Has the last date been extended amid employee demands?The Commission is holding a three-day consultation session from April 28 to April 30. During these meetings, representatives from various employee groups are discussing key issues related to pay, allowances and service conditions.

Rajiv Bajaj to step down from Bajaj Finance board at end of termRajiv Bajaj's tenure as a non-executive director will conclude at the close of the company's upcoming annual general meeting, in line with regulatory requirements.

Odisha bank case explained: Rules for withdrawing money after deathOnce an account holder dies, the account is no longer treated as a normal account. Any access to funds becomes a claim settlement process, not a simple withdrawal.

Kissht IPO opens April 30: Price band, GMP, lot size and key detailsThe Rs 925.92 crore IPO will open on April 30 and close on May 5. The allotment is likely to be finalised on May 6, while listing on the BSE and NSE is expected on May 8.

Ganga Expressway opens: How it may reshape real estate and growth in UPThe launch of the Ganga Expressway marks a major moment for Uttar Pradesh. Beyond faster travel, the project is expected to unlock new real estate hotspots and drive economic growth across several cities.

A wealth start-up founder breaks down the Rs 40-crore retirement ruleDezerv co-founder Sandeep Jethwani said on a podcast that a metro retiree may need Rs 40 crore by 60. His calculation hinges on urban inflation, longer lifespans and the gap between nominal returns and real gains.

Health claim denied for late filing? Here's what you need to knowMany policyholders have seen their claims rejected just for missing deadlines, even when the expenses were genuine. However, a recent court ruling brings much-needed relief. Here are the details.

Sensex jumps 1,000 points: What's driving the rally on Dalal Street today?Domestic markets surged on Wednesday, with the Sensex rising over 1,000 points and the Nifty climbing to around 24,318. Gains across auto, banking, IT, energy and consumption stocks pointed to a broad-based recovery in sentiment.

This new form replaces 15G, 15H as PF rules get simpler. What it means for youFor years, EPF subscribers have been used to filing Forms 15G and 15H. That process has now changed. A single new form has replaced both, making PF rules simpler, but what does it mean for you?

The case of the missing workers: How labour law evasion persists in plain sightIn the fifth episode in this series on labour laws and Inspector Raj, this article examines how a 1990 inspection and a 2026 exchange highlight gaps in records, compliance and enforcement.

Quant funds or traditional mutual funds: What works better for Indians today?Quant brings scalability, discipline, and the power of data. Traditional brings context, adaptability, and judgement. As markets evolve and technology gets more deeply embedded in how money is managed, the investors who do well will not be the ones who pick sides.

Can India handle oil over $100? What it means for growth, inflation, marketsThe West Asia conflict has pushed up crude prices and exposed India's dependence on energy imports. How long the war lasts will decide the hit to growth, inflation, the rupee and markets.

Customers Bank CEO uses AI clone on earnings call to signal automation pushCustomers Bank CEO Sam Sidhu said an AI clone delivered part of the lender's earnings call. The moment underlined the bank's wider push to use OpenAI tools across lending, onboarding and operations.

8th Pay Commission meeting: Inside details of closed-door talks on key pay demandsI visited the 8th Pay Commission office to find out what was on the agenda of the closed-door consultations that began in Delhi yesterday. Here are the exclusive details.

entertainment.headline: 5 reasons why Michael is turning into a global crowd-puller Antoine Fuqua's Michael opened huge despite poor reviews and after production troubles. Nostalgia, hit songs and Michael Jackson's loyal fan base has turned the film into an early box-office force.

Patriot pre-sales: Mammootty-Mohanlal film eyes Rs 25 crore global opening day Mammootty and Mohanlal starrer Patriot has crossed Rs 3.5 crore in Kerala pre-sales ahead of release. The film is also nearing Rs 9 crore worldwide, reflecting strong demand in India and overseas.

Archana Puran Singh's son recovers Rs 87k he'd lost in scam. Here's how family joked Archana Puran Singh's son Ayushmaan Sethi has recovered the Rs 87,000 he said was lost in an alleged credit card fraud. The update came with family banter in a recent vlog.

Aamir Khan, son Junaid twin in MI jerseys at Wankhede Stadium for IPL match Aamir Khan attended the IPL 2026 match between Mumbai Indians and Sunrisers Hyderabad at Wankhede Stadium with son Junaid Khan.

Read how they did it SFX supervisor Vishal Tyagi revealed that the climax explosion sequence in Dhurandhar: The Revenge was filmed without the use of CGI, unlike most new films. Read on to know how the challenging sequence was executed.

Lukkhe trailer: Raashii Khanna, King, Palak Tiwari lead musical action drama The trailer of Lukkhe has been released, offering a look at the upcoming musical action drama set in Punjab. Starring Raashii Khanna, King, Palak Tiwari and Lakshvir Singh Saran, the series will stream on Prime Video from May 8.

Shefali Shah's Dance Day video on Sapne Mein Milti Hai is pure 90s nostalgia Shefali Shah shared a candid video of herself dancing to the song Sapne Mein Milti Hai on International Dance Day. The playful post revived memories of the 1998 film Satya and the iconic song.

Revisiting Kyunki's darkest chapter: Akashdeep Saigal, marital rape, Tulsi's horror Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi 2 revisits its darkest past as Akashdeep Saigal returns in a new avatar, stirring old memories and emotions. The account underscored how training, screen tests and family reactions shaped the biopic's most scrutinised decision.

The buzz reflects his strong fan base in the Hindi belt after the success of Pushpa: The Rise and Pushpa 2: The Rule.

OTT releases this week: Glory, Undekhi S4, Sapne Vs Everyone S2 and more From action-packed thrillers and emotional sports dramas to animated adventures and intense crime sagas, several new films and web series are arriving on OTT platforms this week.

He said the role needs a face that reflects the superhero's image, even as the film remains in the works.

Neetu teaches Ranbir Kapoor 'Senti' moves ahead of Daadi Ki Shaadi. Watch Neetu Kapoor and Ranbir Kapoor danced to the Daadi Ki Shaadi song Senti while posing for the paparazzi. The video is going viral as the film gears up for its May 8 release.

general news.headline: Poll of polls: DMK in TN, Congress return in Kerala, NDA in Assam, Bengal suspenseA poll of exit polls have predicted a big win for the BJP in Assam and gave the party an edge ahead of the ruling TMC in West Bengal. The polls also suggested that the DMK is likely to return to power in Tamil Nadu, while the Congress-led UDF may make a comeback in Kerala after 10 years.

India pulls off a power miracle. A big thanks to the SunIndia touched an all-time peak power demand without any shortage, and it was solar that stepped up at the most critical hour, supplying nearly 21% of the electricity. This moment underscores a quiet but decisive shift that the sun is no longer just a supplement but a key driver of India's energy resilience.

Video: Car flies off hilly road in Himachal after tyre burst, falls into gorgeA speeding car plunged into a deep gorge on the Una highway in Himachal, killing two people. CCTV footage and the preliminary police enquiry suggest a tyre burst may have triggered the fire and crash.

Godrej Industries lays out 2031 growth ambitionsThe purpose statement, 'Crafting tomorrow since 1897', celebrates the Godrej Group's legacy while clearly positioning the new, refreshed Godrej Industries for the future.

Bengaluru rain fury: 7 dead after hospital wall collapses; streets turn to riversHeavy rains in Bengaluru triggered a hospital wall collapse, killing seven people and injuring several others. Large parts of the city were flooded, with streets submerged in waist-deep water, disrupting normal life.

Why Modi's silence during elections screamsAs West Bengal voted, Narendra Modi's football outing in Sikkim and the Ganga Expressway launch in Uttar Pradesh drew national attention. During election campaigns, Modi often does something distinctive. Here's a look at his appearances through the polls, that carry political and cultural signalling.

Authorities have launched an enquiry and are investigating possible safety lapses at the site.

Delhi man offers water to food delivery rider. Her reply brings focus to privilegeThe story comes as Delhi and surrounding areas continue to reel in soaring temperatures, with outdoor workers facing the harshest conditions.

1 litre of ethanol needs 10,000 litres water: Hidden cost of India's fuel pushIndia's total ethanol production capacity stands at 1,822 crore litres, with a disproportionate share concentrated in already water-stressed states like Delhi and Maharashtra.

Hindu Independent wins Muslim-majority ward in Godhra as BJP secures majorityIndependent candidate Apekshaben Naineshbhai Soni won Godhra's Muslim-majority Ward 7 in the 2026 municipal polls. The result drew attention amid the BJP's first full majority in the civic body and sparked discussion on changing local voter priorities.

IPL Play of the Day: SRH prove T20 is a bowlers' game too with Wankhede masterclassMI vs SRH, IPL 2026: Sunrisers turned the game at the death, restricting Mumbai Indians to 243 when the home side looked set to cross 260. Ehsan Malinga shone in the final overs, while Travis Head and Abhishek Sharma later laid the foundation for a record chase at Wankhede Stadium on Wednesday.

Siding with dictators not who we are: Ex-US envoy says Trump favoured PutinFormer US Ambassador to Ukraine Bridget Brink said she resigned from her post because Donald Trump repeatedly sided with Russian President Vladimir Putin, whom she described as a dictator, while reacting to an X post about her successor Julie Davis's departure.

US returns 657 stolen artefacts worth $14 million to IndiaThe Manhattan District Attorney's Office has returned 657 stolen artefacts worth nearly $14 million to India after trafficking investigations. The restitution highlights the scale of cultural theft linked to international smuggling networks.

Good news for India: UAE can now send more oil via Fujairah, bypassing HormuzThe exit from the OPEC grouping has freed the UAE from Saudi-decided production caps. It can raise petroleum output and route more crude to India, using the Habshan-Fujairah oil pipeline, bypassing the Strait of Hormuz. The weakening of the oil cartel will strengthen India's energy security.

Live: Trump, Putin discuss Iran nuclear issue, Ukraine truce planUS-Iran War Live Updates: US President Donald Trump has rejected Iran's proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and lift the blockade, choosing to tighten pressure instead of easing it. He argued the blockade is more effective than military strikes, signalling that Washington is relying on economic strain rather than immediate escalation to force Tehran's hand. That pressure is already showing. Iran's currency has slipped to a record low of 1,810,000 rials to the dollar, according to state-linked media, highlighting the growing toll on its economy. Behind the scenes, the US appears to be settling in for a longer standoff. Trump and his aides have held talks with energy executives on how to keep the blockade in place for months while trying to shield American consumers from rising costs. The political heat is rising at home as well. Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth defended the war during a congressional hearing, brushing aside criticism and calling opponents "the biggest adversary" as he faced lawmakers for the first time since the conflict began. Diplomacy, meanwhile, remains stuck. Pakistan is expected to receive a revised Iranian proposal, but Trump has shown little patience, warning Tehran to "better get smart soon." He also spoke with Russian President Vladimir Putin, who offered to help address Iran's uranium stockpiles, adding another layer to the ongoing negotiations. At the same time, Israel has launched fresh strikes in southern Lebanon, killing emergency workers and soldiers. Israeli forces have made it clear there is "no ceasefire" in their campaign against Hezbollah, despite ongoing efforts for direct talks. Catch all the live updates at indiatoday.in.

No respite for MI as 243 not enough against rampant SRH at Wankhede IPL 2026: SunRisers Hyderabad extended their winning run in the Indian Premier League by recording the 4th highest chase in the history of the tournament. Chasing 244, Heinrich Klaasen anchored the SRH innings and took the team over the line in just 18.4 overs on Wednesday.

IRGC-linked Iran football body chief lands in Canada, sent back hours later Mehdi Taj, the IRGC-linked president of Iran's football federation, was deported from Canada just hours after arriving for this week's FIFA Congress, reigniting debate over Ottawa's tough stance on figures linked to the Iranian regime.

Ayush Shetty, HS Prannoy grab gritty wins as India finish 2nd in group-stage India vs China badminton, Thomas Cup: Ayush Shetty and HS Prannoy grabbed gritty wins in their singles matches as India lost 2-3 against defending champions China. Ryan Rickelton puts SRH bowlers to sword, hits maiden IPL hundred MI vs SRH: Ryan Rickelton provided Mumbai Indians with the perfect foundation to make a comeback in the Indian Premier League. Playing against SRH, Rickelton hit a 44-ball hundred at the Wankhede Stadium.

Kanteerava Stadium turns white after intense hailstorm sweeps Bengaluru A sudden hailstorm in Bengaluru turned Sree Kanteerava Stadium white within minutes. Viral videos had fans joking it looked like snowfall in summer.

Rohit Sharma misses 4th straight IPL 2026 match: What's gone wrong hitman? IPL 2026: Rohit Sharma missed his fourth straight IPL 2026 match as Mumbai Indians faced Sunrisers Hyderabad. Hardik Pandya said the opener needs a couple more games, extending uncertainty around MI's batting.

IPL vaping controversy: BCCI ask Riyan Parag to explain his actionIPL 2026: Riyan Parag and Rajasthan Royals will be asked to explain a vaping incident in the dressing room during their IPL clash against Punjab Kings, following a viral video and public backlash. The controversy has overshadowed RR's thrilling win, with the BCCI reviewing the matter amid growing scrutiny over the franchise's conduct this season.

Golfer Vijay Kumar, former India Open champion, dies at 57Veteran Indian golfer Vijay Kumar died of a heart attack in Lucknow at 57. The 2002 Indian Open winner and four-time Order of Merit champion leaves behind a lasting legacy in Indian golf.

AI chip in Sooryavanshi's bat? Iceland Cricket troll Pak expert over bizarre claimIPL 2026: Iceland Cricket mocked Pakistan cricket's claims of 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi using "AI chips" in his bat after his explosive IPL performances. Sri Lanka Cricket shake-up: Why did its president and entire board resign?Sri Lanka Cricket is set for a major overhaul after president Shammi Silva and the entire SLC board resigned. Badminton Highlights: India finish on a high, Prannoy wins final matchThomas Cup 2026 Highlights, India vs China: India lose to China in the final group-stage tie of the Thomas Cup.
